briefs.title: BC Updates Social Assistance Rules for Housing and Special Care Recipients, Effective December 1
briefs.summary: BC has updated two social assistance regulations — the rules that govern income and disability assistance — to clarify definitions around housing terms (like security deposits and tenancy agreements) and to replace the term 'person in care' with 'person in special care.' Most changes took effect November 17, 2025, with additional housing-related definition updates coming December 1, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC Employment and Assistance housing definition updates take effect

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Labour & Employment, Healthcare
